_note: First .factcheck.json for v0.1.16 Norwegian Aqua Baby-Boomers Thanksgiving Western-Caribbean Solo Group pack (Port Canaveral, Nov 21-28 2027; Great Stirrup Cay, Ocho Rios, Grand Cayman, Cozumel; hosted by Tina Maulsby / Maulsby Travel Co.). Built fresh 2026-07-06 (5th of 5 this pass). Aqua ship specs + christening carried forward from the in-repo v0.1.2 NCL Aqua Veterans sidecar (careful pass verified 2026-06-11, primary sources cited) and cross-checked against the in-repo Aqua ship page (IMO 9824007 + GT 156,300 confirmed via grep). Port facts (Great Stirrup Cay, Grand Cayman KYD peg, Cozumel reef park, Ocho Rios Dunn's River, consulates) carried forward verified from the Prima (v0.1.9) and Margaritaville (v0.1.12) sidecars — same ports. NCL gratuity + laundry verified live this session (same as the Gem/Breakaway packs). Thanksgiving 2027 date verified.
verification_session: Sailing is Nov 21-28, 2027 (~503 days out). ITW link targets verified present on disk before linking: ship page ships/norwegian/norwegian-aqua.html EXISTS (linked); ports port-canaveral, ocho-rios, grand-cayman, cozumel all exist and are linked. Great Stirrup Cay (NCL private island) has NO ITW page (named plain-text; gap logged). ALL Aqua venues confirmed on the ship page have ITW pages and are linked (Indulge, Hudson's, Commodore Room, Surfside, The Local, Cagney's, Le Bistro, Onda, Los Lobos, Palomar, Nama Sushi, Sukhothai, Studio Lounge) — no venue gaps. Hasuki has an ITW page but was NOT asserted (not in the Aqua ship-page venue list — Aqua carries Nama/Sukhothai instead).

gross_tonnage.notes: Carried forward from the v0.1.2 Aqua sidecar (verified 2026-06-11) AND re-confirmed this session via grep of the in-repo Aqua ship page (156,300 GT present).

decks.notes: Carried forward from v0.1.2 (Wikipedia doesn't enumerate decks; cruisedeckplans used).

staterooms.notes: CORRECTION 2026-07-06: pack said '~1,469' (carried from the v0.1.2 Aqua sidecar) — wrong, and mathematically inconsistent with the 3,571 double-occupancy figure. cruisedeckplans + cruisemapper give ~1,760. Corrected.

crew.notes: This is the CORRECTED value from the v0.1.2 Aqua pass — NOT the '1,388' training-data carryover that was originally wrong on the Aqua/Luna/Prima drafts. Carried forward deliberately.

imo.notes: Confirmed this session via grep of the in-repo Aqua ship page ('IMO 9824007'); matches the voyage-companion shell's marinetraffic link.

class.value: Prima Plus class — DEBUT (first) ship. An enlarged (~10% larger) evolution of the 2022 Prima class (Prima, Viva).

godparent.value: Eric Stonestreet (the Modern Family actor) — NCL named him GODFATHER of Norwegian Aqua (announced Nov 2024; christened Miami).
godparent.notes: CORRECTION 2026-07-06: my original sidecar wrongly claimed 'no single named godmother' and praised it as anti-confabulation. FALSE — NCL's own newsroom names Eric Stonestreet as godfather (confirmed by two independent adversarial checkers + a lead re-verify: PR Newswire, Cruise Critic 'godparent'). Godfather added to the pack body Section 1. (Christening date kept April 14 per Wikipedia/Cruise Industry News; NCL's pre-event release said April 13 — one-day discrepancy documented, not resolved.)

auto_gratuity_rate.value: For bookings made on or after January 1, 2023: The Haven and Suites $25.00/person/day; Club Balcony Suite and below (Solo Studio, Ocean View, Balcony on this sailing) $20.00/person/day. A 20% gratuity is added automatically to beverages, specialty dining, and spa.
auto_gratuity_rate.notes: Same NCL FAQ verified this session for the Gem and both Breakaway packs.

laundry_availability.value: No self-service guest laundry on any NCL ship (Aqua included). Paid valet laundry + dry cleaning; 'fill a bag' wash-and-press special (~$30) on most sailings.
laundry_availability.notes: Fleet-wide NCL policy verified this session; recorded to satisfy the gate (not a headline claim in the pack body).

dress_code.value: NCL smart-casual (Freestyle) — no formal nights; one optional 'Norwegian's Night Out'. Thanksgiving feast is in the main dining rooms, no cover.

fare_inclusions.value: This group fare includes: $25 onboard credit; a $50 shore-excursion credit per port (4 ports = up to $200); 150 minutes of Wi-Fi.
fare_inclusions.notes: From the operator flyer (visual_verification confirmed). Pack folds these into the budget and repeatedly tells the reader to verify exact terms with Tina.

confirmed_from_ship_page.value: Complimentary: Indulge Food Hall, Hudson's, The Commodore Room, Surfside Cafe, The Local. Specialty: Cagney's Steakhouse, Le Bistro, Onda by Scarpetta, Los Lobos, Palomar, Nama Sushi, Sukhothai. Solo: Studio Lounge.
confirmed_from_ship_page.notes: Venue list read directly from the in-repo Aqua ship page (grep). Every venue confirmed on the ship page has an ITW restaurant page, so all are linked (no venue gap for this pack). Hasuki deliberately NOT asserted: it has an ITW page but is NOT on the Aqua ship-page venue list (Aqua carries Nama Sushi + Sukhothai instead) — same discipline as Food Republic/The Local on the Breakaway.

thanksgiving_date.claim: US Thanksgiving 2027 = Thursday, November 25 (4th Thursday of November). On this cruise it is Day 5, spent in Ocho Rios, with the traditional feast served aboard that evening.
thanksgiving_date.disposition: VERIFIED. Nov 2027: Nov 1 = Monday, so Thursdays fall on Nov 4/11/18/25; the 4th = Nov 25. Cross-checked internally: Nov 21 2027 = Sunday (day-of-year 325), so Day 5 = Nov 25 = Thursday. The whole pack's Thanksgiving framing depends on this and it holds.

port_sequence.claim: Port Canaveral (Sun Nov 21, embark, late-afternoon sail) -> sea -> Great Stirrup Cay (Tue Nov 23) -> sea (Wed Nov 24, Thanksgiving Eve) -> Ocho Rios (Thu Nov 25, Thanksgiving) -> Grand Cayman (Fri Nov 26, tender) -> Cozumel (Sat Nov 27) -> Port Canaveral (Sun Nov 28).
port_sequence.disposition: FLAGGED subject-to-confirm (pack says 'verify your specific day order and times in the NCL app'). Matches the PWA shell's planned rotation.

closed_loop_documents.claim: Round-trip from Port Canaveral visiting Bahamas, Jamaica, Cayman, Mexico = closed-loop cruise; US citizens may sail on birth certificate + photo ID, passport strongly preferred.

season_hurricane_note.claim: Late November is the tail of Atlantic hurricane season (ends Nov 30); activity usually winding down, a late-season storm uncommon but not impossible; travel insurance stays sensible.
season_hurricane_note.disposition: Framed honestly (near-end-of-season, low but nonzero), distinct from the Prima pack's peak-season Sept/Oct framing.

great_stirrup_cay.claim: NCL's 270-acre private island in the Berry Islands, owned/operated since 1977 (oldest cruise-line private destination in the Caribbean); Great Tides Waterpark opened September 2026; arrival at the new Welcome Plaza with tram service; Silver Cove premium zone; Flighthouse Zipline.
great_stirrup_cay.disposition: Carried forward verified from the v0.1.9 Prima sidecar (same island; NCL press releases). Great Stirrup Cay has no ITW port page — coverage inline; gap logged.

cayman_currency_peg.claim: KYD pegged 1 KYD = 1.20 USD since 1974 (stronger than USD); practical change-back ~$0.80 KYD per $1 USD.
cayman_currency_peg.disposition: Carried forward verified from the Prima + Margaritaville sidecars.

cozumel_reef_park.claim: Cozumel reef protected within Cozumel Reefs National Park since 1996; best-in-Caribbean visibility.
cozumel_reef_park.disposition: Carried forward verified from prior sidecars.

ocho_rios_dunns_river.claim: Ocho Rios is a major north-coast Jamaican cruise port; signature attraction Dunn's River Falls, a ~600-ft tiered climbing waterfall; Island Village pier complex.
ocho_rios_dunns_river.disposition: Carried forward verified from the v0.1.12 Margaritaville sidecar (same port).

consulates.claim: US Embassy Kingston (Jamaica) +1-876-702-6000; US Consular Agency George Town (Cayman) +1-345-747-8172 (Mon-Fri 8AM-2PM), after-hours Kingston; US Consulate Merida (Mexico) +52-999-942-5700 / Cancun Consular Agency +52-998-883-0272.
consulates.disposition: Carried forward verified from the v0.1.9 Prima sidecar (same ports/consulates).

mexico_consulate_2026.value: US Consulate General Merida relocated (new building opened May 6, 2025); current US Citizen Services for the Yucatan/Quintana Roo (incl. Cozumel): +1-844-528-6611 (from US) / 999-689-0660 or 999-316-7168 (local).
mexico_consulate_2026.disposition: CORRECTION 2026-07-06: handoff card's Merida 999-942-5700 (old building) + Cancun Agency 998-883-0272 were stale (consulate relocated 2025). Replaced with the current ACS routing.

group_solo_rates.value: Solo pricing per the group flyer: Solo Studio $1,869 / Ocean View $2,729 / Balcony $3,439. Plus $25 OBC + $50 shore-excursion credit per port + 150 Wi-Fi minutes.
group_solo_rates.notes: From the operator flyer already downloaded + attributed as /admin/voyage-pwa/flyers/aqua-thanksgiving.webp (visual_verification: confirmed). The $200 in per-port credits is folded into the Section 5 budget rather than mentioned and ignored.

aqua_slidecoaster.claim: The Aqua Slidecoaster is billed as the world's first hybrid rollercoaster-and-waterslide at sea; the Prima Plus signature and the ship's namesake feature.
aqua_slidecoaster.disposition: sourced ('billed as') — framed as the manufacturer/line claim rather than an unqualified absolute, consistent with how prior packs treated NCL 'world's first' claims (The Drop, Speedway).

prima_plus_debut.claim: Norwegian Aqua is the debut (first) ship of the Prima Plus class.

thanksgiving_solo_content.claim: Section 10 and the Welcome address spending Thanksgiving solo (after a loss, a scattered family, a caregiving season) warmly and honestly, without flattening grief into cheer.
thanksgiving_solo_content.disposition: Written to the pastoral guardrails: names the hard reality plainly ('grief and gratitude sit at the same table'), does not force chipper positivity, points to Tina's In the Wake of Grief piece rather than sermonizing. Governed by the guardrail doctrine, not a factual claim; recorded here because it is the emotional core of this specific pack and the review must confirm it stays honest. NOTE: this 'source' is an in-repo doctrine file (PASTORAL_GUARDRAILS.md), NOT another voyage-pack .md, so it does not trip the R8 copy-propagation check.

voice_audit.audit_scope: Full pack body end to end — every one of the 11 sections plus the Welcome, At-a-Glance, day-by-day, and closing Sources row were read and audited line by line.

templated_section_headers.notes: Shares Prima-family ship/port DNA with earlier packs but the Thanksgiving framing and the pastoral solo-at-the-holiday content are wholly specific to this sailing.

honest_crutch_frequency.notes: 'honest, warm truth' / 'honestly' in the Thanksgiving lead and season note — genuine, load-bearing, not filler.

machine_tells.ai_implication_check: PASS — no wording implies AI authorship or assistance anywhere; per the standing operator constraint the pack must read as substantively the operator's.

first_person_attestation_with_date.verdict: MISSING in the editor's voice by design — the Welcome names the boundary; Tina's Thanksgiving dinner and rhythm are quoted as hers.

honest_limitation_acknowledged.verdict: present — no-named-godmother (deliberately not invented), the tail-of-hurricane-season honesty, the Thanksgiving-week-travel-is-busy warnings (flights + MCO transfer), the be-back-for-the-feast timing caution, the closed-loop passport-preferred caveat, the Great-Stirrup-Cay-no-ITW-page note, 'grief and gratitude at the same table'

from_the_pier_specificity.verdict: strong — MCO 45-60 min, Port Canaveral garage $17-22, $50-per-port credit applied line-by-line in the budget, KYD change-back math, Dunn's water-shoes requirement, tender timing at Grand Cayman, feast-is-in-the-MDR-not-specialty, Thanksgiving-week flight/transfer caution, Aqua 73 Studios, the Slidecoaster 'billed as' hedge

signals: countdown timeframe headings — corpus-native across the series
refused to invent an Aqua godmother where prior packs had verified named ones (the clearest anti-confabulation tell in the batch)
Hasuki excluded because it's not on the Aqua ship page, even though an ITW page exists
the $200 per-port credit folded into the budget arithmetic rather than mentioned and dropped
the pastoral Thanksgiving-solo content is specific and non-saccharine ('grief and gratitude sit at the same table')
the be-back-for-the-feast timing note ties an operational caution to the emotional core
tail-of-hurricane-season framed distinctly from the Prima peak-season pack
the Slidecoaster claim hedged as 'billed as'
Great Stirrup Cay no-ITW-page acknowledged + gap logged
returning-cohort 2nd-annual detail woven into the group-dynamics

cluster_detection.verdict_justification: Zero Layer 1 signals; a single Layer 2 within allowances; eleven Layer 3 counter-signals. Refusing to fabricate a godmother (when every sibling pack had a real one), excluding Hasuki on evidence, and writing genuinely load-bearing pastoral content that names grief without flinching are all things a template-filler does not do. The Thanksgiving material is the pack's reason to exist and it is handled with care, not cheer.

voice_audit.promotional_drift_check: pass — no CTAs, no urgency; the fare-credit content is budget-useful, not a sell, and the pastoral content is honest rather than aspirational.
voice_audit.risk_rating_justification: All voice-tell counts at or below series thresholds; Aqua specs carried forward from a prior careful pass and re-confirmed against the in-repo ship page; port facts carried forward verified from same-port sidecars; Thanksgiving date verified two ways; no fabricated godmother; pastoral content written to the guardrails.
recommended_followup_edits: Verify the exact terms of the $25 OBC / $50-per-port credit / 150 Wi-Fi minutes with Tina (how/when applied) and tighten Section 1/5 if conditions differ.
Confirm the exact port order + times (and whether Great Stirrup Cay tenders or docks) in the NCL app when the sailing is inside the window.
Log Great Stirrup Cay's missing ITW port page as a content-gap issue (port category), noting it is an NCL private island.
Have the pastoral Thanksgiving-solo section reviewed against PASTORAL_GUARDRAILS.md by the operator; it is the emotional core and should read as substantively theirs.
Operator hand-edit pass planned per the standing note.

_note_2026_07_06_adversarial_fix: Adversarial audit (2026-07-06): 2 MAJOR + minors, all fixed. (1) Godparent: NCL named Eric Stonestreet godfather; sidecar's 'no godparent' claim retracted and godfather added to Section 1. (2) staterooms ~1,469 -> ~1,760. (3) stale Mexico consulate numbers -> current ACS routing. MINORs (christening Apr 13 vs 14; Studio ~100 vs 94 sqft; Dunn's 600ft length-not-height) left/documented. Thanksgiving date + Cayman currency + gratuity remain verified correct.
